title: Personal User - no headset policy, all settings unlocked
scenario: All device settings remain unlocked and changeable for personal users (no headset policy) in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and log in as a personal user (or continue as Guest).
2. From the Home screen, tap on the connected headset to open Device Settings.
3. Verify that all settings (e.g., Audio Settings, ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications) are visible and not grayed out or locked.
4. Attempt to change each setting (e.g., toggle ANC on/off, adjust Equalizer bands, enable/disable Transparency Mode, modify Notification settings).
expected: All device settings are unlocked and can be changed by the personal user.
